subject: Fwd: Well Development
body:
Brice is asking for your signed approval of the deep well option.   $2.295 MM 
over three years.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: Zorroranch@aol.com
Subject: Well Development
Date: Mon, 07 Apr 2008 17:26:35 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Dear Darren, 
     Attached memo and  estimated expenditure for Well Development at Zorro  
Ranch. JEE has verbally approved the Deep Well Development program, but due to 
 the scale of this project I am requesting that JEE sign off on this  project.
    Please note that I will do everything in my power to  lessen the 
expenditure of this project 
Regards Brice
